title: Focus-Trapped Sidebar Navigation

statement.markdown:
## Focus-Trapped Sidebar Navigation

Create a focus-trapped navigation drawer component.

### Requirements:
1. **Focus loop**: Opening the drawer traps keyboard navigation focus within drawer navigation links.
2. **Restoring focus**: Closing drawer navigation panel returns keyboard active focus to target trigger toggle button.
3. **Role Dialog**: Add accessibility role configurations (`role="dialog"`, `aria-hidden`) maintaining structural page integrity.

constraints: Must block keyboard interaction outside the active drawer
Escape button key events must close the drawer

starterCode.html: Profile Settings Log out

gradingCriteria.description: Verify active focus remains trapped inside open drawer links.
Verify trigger button gains focus upon closing navigation drawer panels.
